notification.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "param([string]$Title,[string]$Message) Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $ni = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $ni.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $ni.BalloonTipTitle = $Title; $ni.BalloonTipText = $Message; $ni.Visible = $true; $ni.ShowBalloonTip(8000); Start-Sleep -Seconds 9; $ni.Dispose()"
